description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image with nats:latest and nats-streaming:latest services and sets LOG_LEVEL=error and NODE_ENV=ci variables. Define two stages: test and deploy, and run npm i in a before_script for all jobs. In the test stage add a test job that executes node_modules/.bin/nyc npm test && node_modules/.bin/nyc report --reporter=html --reporter=text-summary and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on test, moves the coverage/ directory into public/ with mv coverage/ public/, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in 30 days.
